deploy.startCommand: bash -lc 'D="${DATA_DIR:-/data}"; echo "=== ALL MOUNTS (df -h) ==="; df -h 2>&1 || true; echo "=== MOUNT TABLE (grep data) ==="; mount 2>&1 | grep -i data || echo "(no data mount found)"; echo "=== /proc/mounts ==="; grep -i data /proc/mounts 2>&1 || echo "(nothing)"; echo "=== LSBLK ==="; lsblk 2>&1 || echo "(lsblk unavailable)"; echo "=== DATA_DIR INFO ==="; echo "DATA_DIR=$D"; ls -la "$D" 2>&1 | head -20 || true; stat -f "$D" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== DISK USAGE OF $D ==="; df -h "$D" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== /data BREAKDOWN ==="; du -sh "$D"/* 2>/dev/null | sort -h || true; echo "=== TRY ONLINE RESIZE2FS ==="; DEV=$(df "$D" --output=source 2>/dev/null | tail -1); echo "device=$DEV"; if [ -n "$DEV" ] && command -v resize2fs >/dev/null 2>&1; then resize2fs "$DEV" 2>&1 || echo "(resize2fs failed or not ext4)"; else echo "(resize2fs not available or no device)"; fi; echo "=== CLEANUP TEMPFILES ==="; find "$D/deliveries" -name "*.part" -delete 2>/dev/null; find "$D" -name "*.tmp" -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "cleanup ok"; if [ "${MORTHE_PURGE_DELIVERIES:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "=== PURGE DELIVERIES (MORTHE_PURGE_DELIVERIES=1) ==="; find "$D/deliveries" -type f -print -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "purge done"; fi; if [ "${MORTHE_PURGE_THUMBS:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "=== PURGE THUMB CACHE (MORTHE_PURGE_THUMBS=1) ==="; find "$D/thumb_cache" -type f -print -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "purge done"; fi; echo "=== POST-CLEANUP DISK ==="; df -h "$D" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== STARTING UVICORN ==="; exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT'
